name: Restaurant Floor
description: Live floor map and reservations workspace for front-of-house staff. Real-time table status, reservation calendar, and guest seating.

page_briefs.floor: Live floor map showing tables color-coded by status (open, seated, ordering, paying, dirty). Compact KPI strip at top with covers, turn-time, and wait list size. Right rail activity feed shows real-time seatings, checks closed, and guest arrivals.
page_briefs.reservations: Day calendar view with timeline slots and party bubbles representing each reservation. Below, a sortable data table listing reservations with guest name, party size, time, table, phone, and status (confirmed, arrived, seated, no-show).
page_briefs.new-reservation: Form sections for guest details (name, phone, email, party size, date, time, special requests) alongside an interactive table map to assign the reservation to a specific table. Submit creates a confirmed booking.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area for floor operations
